# Point / Structural

**Path:** `global_descriptor/handcrafted/point_or_structure`

Handcrafted global descriptors built from point sets, stable primitives, graphs, contours, triangles, or other explicit structures.

## Scope

**Include:** stable triangle descriptor; contour or graph signature

**Exclude:** learned graph networks
